{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Sage of Fallen Blades
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sage of Fallen Blades]] is one of three [[Sages]] who manifested the [[Sword Icon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Sage of Fallen Blades]] wears a white circle.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16">''Dreadgod'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
